Embed an interactive map showing the location 'Choriya Township Bypass Road, Kurduvadi-413208' using an iframe-based map service (Google Maps or OpenStreetMap)

Apply a professional medical-themed design with a clean, trustworthy aesthetic using a color palette of greens and whites with blue accents, modern sans-serif typography, and a layout that emphasizes credibility and accessibility
Update the embedded Google Maps iframe to display the correct location for 'Ghuge Medicals, Choriya Township Bypass Road, Kurduwadi' with accurate coordinates

Update the Google Maps iframe embedded in App.tsx to use accurate coordinates for 'Ghuge Medicals, Choriya Township Bypass Road, Kurduwadi-413208' so the map displays the correct town of Kurduwadi instead of the wrong location currently shown

Create a new section below the existing contact information and map that displays detailed business information from the Google Maps listing for Ghuge Medicals at https://maps.app.goo.gl/Py3ZHuvGRmuYgHkw5, including any available descriptions, business category, and location details presented in a visually organized card format

Update the Google Maps iframe src attribute to use the exact coordinates from the Google Maps link https://maps.app.goo.gl/Py3ZHuvGRmuYgHkw5 to ensure the embedded map displays the precise location of Ghuge Medicals
Remove the embedded Google Maps iframe from the contact section in App.tsx while preserving the text address display 'Choriya Township Bypass Road, Kurduvadi-413208'
